subcodes.first_line: A Book sent down in truth from Him Who possesseth knowledge of the heavens and of the earth, and verily I am the All-Knowing. Therein doth He impart tidings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق من لدن من عنده علم السموات و الارض و انا العلیم و فیه یخبر
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @station of the Manifestation of God, @prophecy and fulfillment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
